title: Streets, pavement and repair of
doc_html:
§675.  Streets, pavement and repair of

The provisions contained in R.S. 45:323, relating to the paving and repairing of streets, shall be equally applicable to street railway companies.
doc_text:
§675.  Streets, pavement and repair of
The provisions contained in R.S. 45:323, relating to the paving and repairing of streets, shall be equally applicable to street railway companies.
